case_title: THOMAS MAO VS. TD FAMILY TRUST CORPORATION DBA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAO, THOMAS
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) PHOEBE DINH, AGENT & SECRETARY. FILED BY DEFENDANT TD FAMILY TRUST CORPORATION DBA HORIZON AUTO REPAIR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAO, THOMAS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TD FAMILY TRUST CORPORATION DBA HORIZON AUTO REPAIR STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $0. SERVED FEB-18-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TD FAMILY TRUST CORPORATION DBA HORIZON AUTO REPAIR
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY MAO, THOMAS TD FAMILY TRUST CORPORATION DBA HORIZON AUTO REPAIR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-28-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-28-2023 BY JUDGE PANG LY. PLAINTIFF THOMAS MAO IS PRESENT AND IS ASSISTED BY PROVISIONALLY QUALIFIED CANTONESE COURT INTERPRETER REBECCA CHAU. DEFENDANT TD FAMILY TRUST CORPORATION DBA HORIZON AUTO REPAIR IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY EDDY TRAN (MANAGER) AND PHOEBE DINH (AGENT & SECRETARY). PLAINTIFF ORALLY STATED TO CORRECT SPELLING OF HIS LAST NAME FROM 'MAO' TO 'MOA', NAME IS CORRECTED BY COURTROOM CLERK IN THE SYSTEM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF MAO, THOMAS
REMARK:RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE DEC-15-22, SC-100 MAIL TO TD FAMILY TRUST CORPORATION (ENVOLOPE MARKED:VACANT UNABLE TO FORWARD)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,570.00 FILED BY MAO, THOMAS AS TO DEFENDANT TD FAMILY TRUST CORPORATION DBA HORIZON AUTO REPAIR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-26-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-26-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE AND FOR CANTONESE INTERPRETER TO MAR-28-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF THOMAS MOA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TD FAMILY TRUST CORPORATION DBA HORIZON AUTO REPAIR IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF REQUESTS IN COURT TO PROVIDE CANTONESE INTERPRETER, CANTONESE COURT CERTIFIED INTERPRETER WINNIE CHAN #785540 VIA ZOOM ASSISTED WITH TRANSLATION. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. ACCESS CENTER INFORMATION IS GIVEN TO PLAINTIFF REGARDING OF PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MURLENE J. RANDLE; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
